meaning: 帝力[帝汶岛(Timor)东北部港市]
examples: For months, workers have been feverishly sprucing up Dili, Timor-Leste's scruffy capital.
The Indonesian Government has given official approval for an Australian consulate in Dili.
Additional insecticides and larvicides are expected to reach Dili next week.
One voter in the capital Dili, Joao da Costa, said the election was peaceful.
The mood in the capital Dili was calm, Michael Maley, a volunteer observer told the Australian broadcaster.
